title: Archivum Bridge Message Schema
description: Deterministic communication schema for cross-agent synchronization in the Phase Mirror Agency.

witness_id.description: Unique UUID for the handshake event.

action_id.description: Identifier for the cross-agent workflow (e.g., SYNC-FT01-LE02).

timestamp.description: RFC3339 formatted timestamp of the handshake.

prime_index.description: The Miller-Rabin verified identity of the sending ensemble.

payload.description: Domain-specific state delta or mission parameters.

prev_hash.description: Hash of the previous block in the AuditChain.

pi_native_hash.description: Cryptographic witness binding the message to the Lawful Core.
